description: Letter fragment addressed to "the mother" Sitt Rayḥān (potentially the wife of Eliyyahu the Judge). Dating probably early 13th century. The sender is "perplexed" at what should be done with the people of Fustat. "The congregation, even the women, have gone over to the Rayyis." He states that Abū l-Manṣūr b. Baqāʾ will provide her with transportation. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
